title: Norway Celebrates Oscar Win for Joachim Trier’s ‘Sentimental Value’
summary_full: “Sentimental Value,” set in Oslo, was named best international feature film. After a slew of negative news in Norway, it was a welcome victory.
summary_public: “Sentimental Value,” set in Oslo, was named best international feature film. After a slew of negative news in Norway, it was a welcome victory.
